name: smart-task-manager-microservices
description: Root project for Smart Task Manager microservices

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix api-gateway && npm install --prefix auth-service && npm install --prefix notification-service && npm install --prefix report-service && npm install --prefix audit-service && npm install --prefix task-service && npm install --prefix client
scripts.lint-all: npm run lint --prefix api-gateway && npm run lint --prefix auth-service && npm run lint --prefix notification-service && npm run lint --prefix report-service && npm run lint --prefix audit-service && npm run lint --prefix task-service && npm run lint --prefix client
scripts.test-all: npm test --prefix api-gateway && npm test --prefix auth-service && npm test --prefix notification-service && npm test --prefix report-service && npm test --prefix audit-service && npm test --prefix task-service && npm test --prefix client
scripts.check-all: npm run lint-all && npm run test-all
